blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,521 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
